form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Curragh July 19 over 1207m, 5 len behind Stop The Nation carrying 61kg at $6.50. On debut sixth of 10 at Curragh April 12 over 1207m, 7 len behind Green Sense with 60.5kg at $13. Sure to be ready to run well.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 15 at Roscommon May 12 over 1508m, 3.5 len behind Leblon Queen carrying 58kg at $2.40. On debut second of 12 at Navan April 26 over 1207m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Charles Darwin carrying 60.5kg at $5.50. Likely to return bigger and better this prep.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 8th of 16 at Naas on September 18 over 1408m, 9 len behind Madbadanddangerous carrying 56kg at $17. Returned from break 4th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Victory Tip with 59.5kg at $8.50. Strips fitter and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 8th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on December 19 over 1207m, 9 len behind Leveraging with 58kg at $13. Second-up 5th of 8 at Dundalk All Weather on February 11 over 1207m, 2.25 len behind Faustyna carrying 57.5kg at $8. No easier this time and others rate better.
